titleStmt.title: SII 41.117: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 117. (A.R. No. 116 of 1905.) Tiruvālīśvaram, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Vālīśvara temple at Tiruvālīśvaram.

summary.p: Vaṭṭeḻuttu. Gift of land by Ambalavaṉ Niṟāḍi of Piḍavūr in Piḍavūr-nāḍu in Chōḻa-nāḍu for the expenses of various services and for wages to the temple establishment in the temple of Tiruvālīśvaram on the bank of the riverKaḍiñai in the northern hamlet (piḍāgai) of Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Muḷḷi-nāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu. The donor purchased the land from the sabhā of the latter village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
rājarājakecaripaṉmarkku yāṇṭu patiṉoṉṟāvatu coḷanāṭṭu vaṭakarai piṭavūr nāṭṭup piṭavūruṭaiyāṉ Ampalavaṉiṟāṭiyāṉ rājarājavaḷanāṭṭu muḷḷi nāṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīrājarāja caturvvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyār pakkal Ivvūr ḻikku vaṭakku
vākkālukku teṟku Oṉpatāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟut tiruvāliśvaravatikkuk kiḻakku teṟkaṭaiyak kāṇi Araikkāṇi kottanūr kiḻakku nokkik kaṭiñaikkaraippiḻanta kokkaṉāvaṉ na Itaṉukkut teṟkum Ivvicainta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ kiṭanta nilattil śrīkoyil vaḷākamuṅ kalluṅ kaḻiccu
nilaṉ veli Iṉṉilaṉ velikkum Oṭṭiṟaiyāka Ikkaṭiñaikkarait tiruvālīśvarattu tevarkku nicatam Uḻakku neyyāl muṭṭāmal Erikkak kaṭava tirunontāviḷakku Oṉṟiṉukku Innirnilam nikki niṉṟa nilaṉ mukkāley mūṉṟumāvilum Araiyekāṇi muntirikai nilam
vaḻiyilārkku cantirātittaval niṉṟu yipparicey kāṇiyākavum kecari marakkālāl muppatiṉ kalanellāka Innilam Araiyey kāṇimuntirikai ni Ittiruvālīśvararattu tevarkku muṉṉūṟṟu Oṉpatiṉ kalaṉey tūṇi Irunāḻi
yākkut tiruvamutukku Oru poḻutaikku Arici nāṉāḻiyāka mūṉṟu poḻutaikku rici paṉṉiṟu nāḻiyum Aṉṉa nellukku Arici Irunāḻiyum Āka Arici patināṉāḻiyum Añciraṇṭākki nellu kuṟuṇiyum mūṉṟu poḻutaikkum neyyamurtukkuṅ kaṟiya Amurtukkum sandhyādīpam Iraṇ
kkum m ney yuḻakkiṉukku nellu Aṟunāḻiyum kaṟiya Amurtukku ṟu nāḻi Uriyum tayir Amurtukku nellu Irunāḻiyum pūvattukku nellu Uriyum Aṭaikkāy Amurtu pākkup paṉṉiraṇṭukkum veṟṟilai Irupattu nālukkum nellu nāṉāḻiyum tirumeypūccuc can
rutūṇi Irunāḻi Āka Āṭṭaivaṭṭam Irunūṟṟu nāṟpattu nāṟkalam 5 kuṟuṇi viṟakukkuṟu nāṟkalaney Eṇ kuṟuṇi Irunāḻi Uriyum Akanāḻikaiyār vacam Aḷappatākavum Ittevarai cānticeyyum brāhmaṇan Oruvaṉukku Āṭṭaivaṭṭam Aṟupatiṉkala nellu Aḷappatākavum Ivvi
kku vāṭākkaṭaṉ Aṭṭa kāṇiyākak kuṭutta Innilaṉ Araiye kāṇi muntirikaiyum nīkki niṉṟa nilaṉ Eḻumāvarai Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyilum Ittevar Akanāḻikaiyārkku Arccaṉāpōkattukkum Ittevarkku nicatappaṭi Akanāḻikaip paṇi ceyya Ivvakanāḻikaip paṇi ceyya Ivvakanāḻikayār Eṇmarum Iyakkiya kāṇikaḷ nālvarkkum Āka nila
tirikaiyum śrībaliyum paḷḷieḻicciyum Uṭpaṭa maṟṟum Ittevarkku vēṇṭuvaṉavaṟṟukku Ellām kāṭṭum Uvaccar Āḷ Añcinukku nilaṉ mūṉṟumā mukkāṇiyum caṅkiraṇṭum kāḷam Iraṇṭum Ūtum Āḷ Iraṇṭiṉukku nilaṉ Orumāvaraiyum tirumeḻukkupuṟam nilaṉ kāṇiyum tirunantavāṉappuṟa
maṟṟum veṇṭuvaṉavaṟṟukkum kalam Iṭum kucavaṉukku nilaṉ kāṇiyum Āka Innilaṉ Eḻumāvarai Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Innivantakkāṟar Ittevarkku Ippaṇikaḷ ceyya Ipparicu nilainiruttiyākavum Āka Innilaṉ mukkāley mūṉṟumāvum Ipparicu kuṭuttēṉ piṭa
ḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 41.117 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
